scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ClientApp && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install && cd ..
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd ClientApp && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd ClientApp && npm run build && cd ../electron && npm run build
scripts.start: concurrently "cd ClientApp && npm run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && npm run dev"
